name: Puffing Tom (Sea Train)
region: Paradise (Grand Line) - Water 7 to Enies Lobby Route
description: The Sea Train, called 'Puffing Tom,' is a revolutionary steam locomotive that travels on underwater tracks between Water 7 and Enies Lobby. Built by the legendary shipwright Tom, it was designed to connect Water 7 to other islands despite the dangerous Aqua Laguna storms. The train runs on tracks laid on the ocean floor, powered by Sea Stone-enhanced steam engines that allow it to push through any weather. During the rescue mission for Robin, the train became a mobile battlefield as the Straw Hats and Franky Family pursued CP9, with intense battles occurring across the moving cars during a massive Aqua Laguna storm. A second train, 'Rocket Man,' was used by the rescue party - an older, faster, more dangerous prototype.
history: The Sea Train was the masterpiece of Tom, a fish-man shipwright of legendary skill who also built Gold Roger's ship, the Oro Jackson. After being sentenced to death for building the Pirate King's ship, Tom was given a reprieve to complete the Sea Train project, which would benefit all of Water 7. He succeeded, creating a transportation revolution that saved the city's economy. However, Spandam (CP5 at the time) framed Tom by stealing his blueprints to build the Battle Frankys that attacked Water 7. Tom took responsibility for his creations and was taken to Enies Lobby, where he was executed. Years later, Tom's apprentices - Iceburg and Franky - continued operating the Sea Trains. When CP9 captured Robin and took her on the Puffing Tom toward Enies Lobby, Sanji stowed away and fought his way through guards. The Straw Hats and Franky Family then boarded Rocket Man, the prototype train, in a desperate chase that involved battles against CP9 agents, the storm itself, and culminated in Sogeking's debut as Usopp's alter ego.
culture: The Sea Train represents Water 7's greatest achievement in shipbuilding technology and Tom's legacy. It operates on strict schedules, running between Water 7, Pucci, San Faldo, and Enies Lobby. The trains are considered marvels of engineering, combining steam power with Sea Stone technology to traverse dangerous waters. Train staff maintain Tom's traditions of excellence and safety. However, the government also uses the train to transport prisoners to Enies Lobby for judgment, making it both a lifeline for commerce and a route to execution.
transportation: The Sea Train itself IS the transportation. It runs on underwater tracks anchored to the ocean floor, powered by steam engines enhanced with Sea Stone to handle storms and sea kings. Puffing Tom is the main passenger train (newer, safer). Rocket Man is the prototype (faster, more dangerous, no brakes). Tracks connect Water 7, Pucci, San Faldo, and Enies Lobby.

traditions: CP9 members eating casually while guarding
Sanji fighting in the kitchen car

notablePeople.name: Tom
notablePeople.description: A fish-man shipwright who built both Gold Roger's Oro Jackson and the Sea Train. Executed after being framed by Spandam. His legacy lives on through his apprentices and his creations. Famous for his motto: 'Do it with a DON!'

notablePeople.name: Kokoro
notablePeople.description: A mermaid (disguised as human) who was Tom's assistant and secretary. Now operates as the conductor and stationmaster. Helped the Straw Hats by piloting Rocket Man during the rescue mission. Heavy drinker.

notablePeople.name: Chimney
notablePeople.description: A young, energetic girl who is 1/4 mermaid. Always seen with her pet rabbit Gonbe. Helped guide the Straw Hats and provided critical reconnaissance during the mission.

notablePeople.name: Gonbe
notablePeople.description: Chimney's pet rabbit with cat-like features (actually a cat acting like a rabbit). Constantly accompanies Chimney and helps in small ways.

notablePeople.name: Wanze
notablePeople.description: A CP7 agent who uses Ramen Kenpo - martial arts involving weaponized ramen noodles. Fought Sanji in the dining car. Has a bizarre appearance with noodles covering his body.

notablePeople.name: T-Bone
notablePeople.description: A chivalrous Marine captain who protected the Sea Train passengers from the Franky Family. Despite his skull-like appearance, he's kind-hearted and honorable. Defeated by the Franky Family's combined assault.

notablePeople.name: Sanji
notablePeople.description: Stowed away on Puffing Tom to rescue Robin. Fought through CP7 agents including Wanze, showcasing his determination to save Robin despite overwhelming odds. Infiltration specialist of the rescue mission.

notablePeople.name: Usopp (Sogeking)
notablePeople.description: Usopp's alter ego that debuted on Rocket Man. Wearing a mask to hide his identity after leaving the crew, he still came to save Robin. His 'Sogeking' persona allowed him to help without directly rejoining.

notablePeople.name: Franky
notablePeople.description: Initially tried to stop the Straw Hats but ended up joining the rescue after learning the truth about Robin and CP9. His presence on Rocket Man marks his first real alliance with the crew.

notablePeople.name: Rob Lucci
notablePeople.description: Guarded Robin on Puffing Tom with cold efficiency. His presence demonstrated the threat level - even Sanji couldn't reach Robin past the CP9 agents.

notablePeople.name: Nico Robin
notablePeople.description: Being transported to Enies Lobby as a prisoner. Despite the rescue attempts, she maintained her decision to sacrifice herself to protect the crew, not revealing her true feelings until later.

subLocations.name: Puffing Tom Engine
subLocations.description: The main engine car of the passenger Sea Train, powered by Sea Stone-enhanced steam engines. Where CP9 elite agents guarded Robin.

subLocations.name: Rocket Man
subLocations.description: Tom's original prototype Sea Train - faster but more dangerous with no brakes. Piloted by Kokoro with the Straw Hats, Franky Family, and Galley-La aboard racing to rescue Robin.

subLocations.name: Dining Car
subLocations.description: Restaurant car where Sanji fought Wanze's bizarre Ramen Kenpo. A chaotic battle that destroyed much of the dining area.

subLocations.name: Passenger Cars
subLocations.description: Standard passenger cars that became battlefields as Sanji fought through CP7 and government agents to reach Robin.

subLocations.name: Train Roof
subLocations.description: The roofs of the train cars where battles occurred during the Aqua Laguna storm. Extremely dangerous with high winds and waves crashing over.

subLocations.name: Underwater Track
subLocations.description: The revolutionary underwater tracks that allow the Sea Train to operate. Built with incredible engineering to withstand Aqua Laguna and sea kings.

items.name: Sea Train Blueprints
items.description: Tom's original designs for the Sea Train system. Stolen by Spandam to frame Tom with the Battle Franky attacks.

items.name: Sogeking Mask
items.description: The mask Usopp created to become Sogeking, the 'Sniper King from Sniper Island.' Allowed him to help rescue Robin while maintaining his pride after leaving the crew.

items.name: Kabuto
items.description: Usopp's upgraded slingshot received from the Franky Family, making its debut as Sogeking's weapon. More powerful than his previous weapons.

items.name: Ramen Kenpo Techniques
items.description: Wanze's bizarre martial art using weaponized ramen noodles as both offense and defense. Defeated by Sanji's kicks.

items.name: CP9 Keys
items.description: Keys held by CP9 members, one of which unlocks Robin's seastone handcuffs. The key mystery becomes crucial at Enies Lobby.

items.name: Sea Stone Train Engine
items.description: The revolutionary Sea Stone-enhanced engine that allows trains to run on underwater tracks through any weather.

items.name: Aqua Laguna Storm
items.description: The massive annual tidal wave that hits Water 7. The rescue mission occurred during the largest Aqua Laguna in years, making the journey even more dangerous.

factions.name: CP9
factions.description: Elite World Government assassins transporting Robin to Enies Lobby. Guarded her on Puffing Tom with overwhelming force.

factions.name: Straw Hat Rescue Party
factions.description: The crew pursuing Robin's rescue, split between Sanji infiltrating Puffing Tom and the others on Rocket Man.

factions.name: Franky Family
factions.description: Initially opposed the Straw Hats but joined the rescue mission on Rocket Man after learning the truth about Pluton and CP9.

factions.name: Tom's Workers (Historical/Current)
factions.description: The original team that built the Sea Train and those who continue operating it, honoring Tom's legacy.

factions.name: CP7 & Marines
factions.description: Lower-level government forces protecting the Sea Train and its passengers, unaware of CP9's true mission.

storyArcs.mangaChapters: Chapters 367-375 (Sea Train Arc - part of Water 7 Saga)
events: Sanji stows away on Puffing Tom
CP9 transports Robin to Enies Lobby
Straw Hats and Franky Family board Rocket Man
Sogeking's debut - Usopp's masked hero persona
Kokoro pilots Rocket Man through Aqua Laguna
Sanji reaches Robin but can't rescue her (CP9 too strong)
Rocket Man catches up to Puffing Tom
Battles on train roofs during storm
Revelation about Tom's past and legacy
Franky fully commits to helping Straw Hats
Rocket Man crashes through Enies Lobby gates

quickFacts: Runs on underwater tracks on ocean floor
Tom also built Gold Roger's ship (Oro Jackson)
Sanji infiltrates alone to rescue Robin
Battles occur during massive Aqua Laguna storm
Rocket Man is faster but has no brakes
Tom's motto: 'Do it with a DON!'

videos.title: Sogeking's Theme and Debut
videos.description: The iconic debut of Sogeking, the Sniper King from Sniper Island, as Usopp's alter ego.

videos.title: Sanji vs Wanze - Ramen Kenpo
videos.description: The bizarre battle between Sanji's kicks and Wanze's weaponized ramen noodles.

videos.title: Rocket Man Crashes into Enies Lobby
videos.description: The dramatic arrival as Rocket Man breaks through Enies Lobby's main gate.
